global.title: REALLY Quick Charge: The state of clean trucking with Joe Annotti
global.summary: On this really quick episode of Quick Charge, we spend time with TRC Senior Director and ACT Expo co-founder Joe Annotti to talk about the state of clean trucking in 2026, incentive programs, and ever so briefly talk about why Autocar was my favorite OEM at this year’s show. more…

global.title: New electric Ferrari proves the Apple Car would have been really, really nice
global.summary: On today’s prancing episode of Quick Charge, the prancing horse people at Ferrari have released a world of firsts: the first-ever electric Ferrari, the brand’s first 5 passenger sedan, AND the first car designed by legendary Apple designer Jony Ive. more…

global.title: BYD’s new Yuan Plus EV adds more range and fast charging for $18,000 [Video]
global.summary: BYD launched the third-generation Yuan Plus, sold overseas as the Atto 3, with its new Flash Charging and nearly 400 miles of driving range. The upgraded electric SUV is on sale now, starting at less than $18,000. more…

global.title: Tesla ‘Robotaxi’ fleet is actually shrinking, not growing, new data shows
global.summary: Less than a month after we reported that Tesla’s unsupervised “Robotaxi” fleet was finally showing some signs of growth, new data from the Robotaxi Tracker tells a different story. The fleet is actually shrinking. The number of active unsupervised Tesla “Robotaxis” has dropped to just 20 vehicles —

global.title: Renewables’ installed capacity to beat natural gas by 2027 – EIA data
global.summary: If small-scale solar is included, newly released US Energy Information Administration (EIA) data reviewed by the SUN DAY Campaign indicates that renewables are on track to surpass natural gas in total electrical generating capacity by early 2027. more…

global.title: BMW is saying goodbye to this popular gas sports car, but a new performance EV will step in
global.summary: The 2027 G80 BMW M3 will be the final model year for the iconic gas-powered sports car, but a performance EV is coming soon that promises to pack even more performance. more…

global.title: Bluetti’s 128Wh Elite 10 Mini power station at $113 low, Segway E3 Pro e-scooter $550, Anker SOLIX EverFrost 2 coolers from $650, more
global.summary: Memorial Day may have passed, but the seasonal and holiday savings aren’t slowing down, with a fresh batch of Green Deals for you today, as well as our updated all-in-one Memorial Day Green Deals hub that we will maintain for a few more days. Leading today’s edition is the 128Wh Bluetti Elite 10 Min

global.title: Volvo EV drivers in Europe gain an easier way into Tesla’s Supercharger network
global.summary: Volvo EV drivers will gain access to over 20,000 Tesla Supercharger stations across 29 European countries, starting later this year. But that’s not even the best part of it. more…

global.title: America is panicking about e-bikes while ignoring the real problem
global.summary: If you spend enough time reading local news headlines these days, you’d be forgiven for thinking electric bicycles are one of the greatest threats facing American streets. Teenagers on fat-tire e-bikes, viral videos of wheelies, stories about injuries complete with ER doctor interviews… the same the

global.title: BYD built this low-cost PHEV specifically for global markets — And it gets +1,000 km range
global.summary: The Dolphin G will go on sale soon as BYD’s first car developed specifically for global markets. BYD said its “game-changing” plug-in hybrid system will offer over 1,000 km (621 miles) of combined range at an affordable price. more…
